# Test VEX generation from Grype report

# Generate VEX from Grype report using mock LLM
exec vens generate --llm=mock --config-file=config.yaml --sbom-serial-number=urn:uuid:3e671687-395b-41f5-a30f-a58921a69b79 report.json output.cdx.json
stderr 'Processing vulnerabilities'

# Verify output file was created
exists output.cdx.json

# Verify output contains expected VEX structure
json-contains output.cdx.json '"bomFormat": "CycloneDX"'
json-contains output.cdx.json 'vulnerabilities'
json-contains output.cdx.json 'GHSA-1234-5678-abcd'

# Verify GHSA source is mapped to GITHUB
json-contains output.cdx.json '"name": "GITHUB"'

-- config.yaml --
project:
  name: "test-project"
  description: "Test project for integration tests"
context:
  exposure: "private"
  data_sensitivity: "medium"
  business_criticality: "high"
-- report.json --
{
  "matches": [
    {
      "vulnerability": {
        "id": "GHSA-1234-5678-abcd",
        "dataSource": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-1234-5678-abcd",
        "namespace": "github:language:python",
        "severity": "High",
        "urls": [
          "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-1234-5678-abcd"
        ],
        "description": "A vulnerability in a Python package",
        "fix": {
          "versions": ["2.0.0"],
          "state": "fixed"
        }
      },
      "relatedVulnerabilities": [],
      "matchDetails": [
        {
          "type": "exact-direct-match",
          "matcher": "python-matcher",
          "searchedBy": {
            "language": "python",
            "namespace": "github:language:python"
          },
          "found": {
            "versionConstraint": "<2.0.0"
          }
        }
      ],
      "artifact": {
        "id": "abc123",
        "name": "vulnerable-package",
        "version": "1.0.0",
        "type": "python",
        "language": "python",
        "purl": "pkg:pypi/vulnerable-package@1.0.0"
      }
    }
  ],
  "source": {
    "type": "image",
    "target": {
      "userInput": "python:3.11"
    }
  },
  "descriptor": {
    "name": "grype",
    "version": "0.74.0"
  }
}
